prompt_config.scene_type: Vintage French poster design with night scene illustration
prompt_config.style: Impressionist realism with autochrome photography texture
prompt_config.text_overlay: HÉRO as main poster title in Art Nouveau typography

main_prompt: A stunning vintage French poster design in Belle Époque style, 1:1 square format, 8K ultra-detailed quality, featuring 'HÉRO' as the large prominent title text in ornamental Art Nouveau typography at the top or center, main illustration showing a captivating night view of Paris 1889 during the Exposition Universelle, the newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark reddish-brown) dramatically illuminated by electric arc lights with cold blue-white glow towering in the composition, the Galerie des Machines with its blue-grey steel and glass vault lit from within, Haussmannian buildings flanking the scene, bustling cobblestone streets reflecting warm golden gaslight, crowds in Belle Époque attire, atmospheric night fog with volumetric god rays, steam rising, square poster composition in the style of Jules Chéret or Toulouse-Lautrec, decorative borders or flourishes, impressionist realism illustration, 8K ultra sharp detail, professional poster design for Instagram

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 format requires centered and balanced composition, vertical emphasis to include Eiffel Tower or intimate street scene
composition_notes.poster_layout: Title 'HÉRO' positioned prominently at top or center of square composition, main illustration balanced below or behind the title
framing_suggestions: Option 1: Title 'HÉRO' at top, vertical slice showing Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise from base upward with Belle Époque crowd in foreground
Option 2: Title 'HÉRO' centered and overlaid, intimate street-level night scene with Tower visible in upper background
Option 3: Title 'HÉRO' at top third, focus on illuminated Galerie des Machines entrance with Tower in distance
Option 4: Symmetrical composition with 'HÉRO' at top, Tower centered, flanked by Haussmannian buildings

architecture.eiffel_tower_night: Newly built Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise (dark red-brown color), dramatically illuminated by powerful electric arc lights creating stark blue-white beams, iron lattice structure casting intricate shadows, the Tower positioned as central focal point in square composition, ultra-detailed metalwork visible in 8K quality
architecture.galerie_des_machines_night: Massive industrial cathedral with blue-grey steel framework, enormous glass vault glowing from within with warm electric light, creating a luminous architectural jewel in the night, ultra-detailed glass panels reflecting light
architecture.haussmannian_buildings_night: Cream-colored limestone buildings with grey-blue zinc mansard roofs flanking the square composition, windows warmly lit from within creating golden rectangles, ornate wrought-iron balconies casting shadows, ultra-detailed stone texture
architecture.street_furniture_night: Wet cobblestones reflecting gaslight like liquid gold in foreground, green Morris columns illuminated with warm glow, newspaper kiosks with lanterns, ornate gas street lamps creating pools of warm yellow light with visible volumetric rays

fashion_1889.women_night: Ladies in Belle Époque S-silhouette dresses, tightly corseted waists, long flowing evening gowns in dark rich colors, elaborate hats adorned with feathers, some carrying small lanterns, silhouettes backlit by gaslight, ultra-detailed fabric textures and lace patterns, positioned in foreground or mid-ground for Instagram engagement
fashion_1889.men_night: Gentlemen in dark three-piece suits and evening frock coats, obligatory hats (top hats for bourgeoisie, bowler hats for workers), handlebar mustaches or full beards, some smoking pipes with visible smoke, carrying canes, ultra-detailed period clothing
fashion_1889.crowd_night: Mixed social classes enjoying the illuminated Exposition, well-dressed bourgeoisie, workers in evening attire, crowds creating depth and human scale against monumental architecture, authentic 1889 fashion accuracy, 8K detailed faces

night_lighting.electric_lights: Revolutionary electric arc lights with cold blue-white illumination on the Eiffel Tower and Exposition buildings, harsh modern technological lighting creating dramatic contrasts, visible light beams in fog
night_lighting.gaslight: Warm golden-yellow flickering gaslight illuminating streets in foreground, soft romantic glow from street lamps, creating intimate pools of warm light, volumetric god rays in fog
night_lighting.interior_lights: Warm candlelight and early electric bulbs glowing from windows, storefronts lit with gas lamps, café windows casting warm amber light onto cobblestones
night_lighting.reflections: All lights reflecting on wet cobblestones creating mirror-like surfaces, puddles reflecting gaslight and electric glow, ultra-detailed light caustics and reflections
night_lighting.contrast: Dramatic chiaroscuro between brightly lit areas and deep shadows, the revolutionary contrast between warm traditional gaslight and cold modern electric light
night_lighting.atmospheric_effects: Dense night fog with volumetric lighting, visible light beams cutting through steam and mist, coal smoke illuminated from below, moonlight subtly illuminating fog

dominant_colors: shadows in prussian blue and violet
color_palette_night.color_description: Rich nocturnal palette dominated by the contrast between warm golden gaslight and cold blue-white electric illumination, deep shadows with subtle color variation, Rouge Venise Tower dramatically lit, Instagram-friendly yet historically accurate with 8K color depth
color_palette_night.instagram_appeal: Rich vintage tones with dramatic contrasts that capture attention in Instagram feeds, nostalgic cinematic aesthetic with jewel-tone colors

text_integration.hero_text: The word 'HÉRO' as the main poster title, designed like a vintage 1889 French theatrical or exhibition poster
text_integration.poster_design: Square Belle Époque poster composition with 'HÉRO' as the prominent title text at the top or center, following the style of Jules Chéret, Toulouse-Lautrec, or Exposition Universelle official posters
text_integration.layout_style: Classic French poster composition adapted to square format with large ornamental title 'HÉRO' in Art Nouveau decorative typography, the Paris 1889 night scene serving as the poster's main illustration beneath or behind the title
text_integration.typography_style: Bold Art Nouveau or Victorian decorative lettering for 'HÉRO', large and prominent as poster title, elegant serifs or ornamental flourishes, typical of 1889 French poster art, scaled appropriately for square format
poster_elements: Large title 'HÉRO' at top or center in ornamental typography
Main illustration: Paris 1889 night scene with illuminated Eiffel Tower
Optional: Decorative borders, flourishes, or frame typical of Belle Époque posters adapted to square format
Optional: Subtle period-appropriate subtitle or text elements
Overall composition balanced for Instagram square format
text_integration.color_hierarchy: Title 'HÉRO' should be visually prominent through color contrast, possibly in warm golden tones, white, or red against the darker night scene background
text_integration.poster_references: Style of Jules Chéret theatrical posters, Toulouse-Lautrec Moulin Rouge posters, 1889 Exposition Universelle official posters, Art Nouveau decorative poster art

visual_texture.8k_detail: Ultra-sharp 8K resolution with extreme detail in architecture, fashion, cobblestone texture, fabric weaves, iron lattice patterns, individual gas lamp flames, water droplet reflections
visual_texture.film_grain: Subtle cinematic film grain maintaining 8K sharpness while adding organic texture
visual_texture.vignetting: Subtle vignette effect on edges, enhanced for square format, professional color grading
visual_texture.finish: Hyper-realistic 8K quality with impressionist realism artistic direction, autochrome photography aesthetic, professional poster design look

camera_specifications.detail_level: Hyper-realistic, extreme detail in every element, razor-sharp focus
camera_specifications.depth_of_field: Deep focus with everything sharp or subtle cinematic depth of field with foreground sharp
camera_specifications.lens_character: Professional cinema lens quality, minimal distortion, high contrast, excellent sharpness
camera_specifications.dynamic_range: High dynamic range capturing detail in both deep shadows and bright electric lights

negative_prompt: modern clothing, contemporary fashion, cars, automobiles, modern buildings, skyscrapers, neon signs, plastic materials, oversaturated colors, bronze Eiffel Tower, wrong historical period, Victorian England fashion, anachronistic elements, modern digital typography, helvetica font, sans-serif modern fonts, minimalist modern design, photoshop overlay text, modern graphic design, daytime, bright sunlight, LED lights, fluorescent lights, modern street lights, smartphone screens, 21st century elements, low resolution, blurry, soft focus, poor quality, jpeg artifacts, modern photography, clean modern aesthetic, contemporary poster design, digital art style, 3D text effects, horizontal composition, wide panorama, stretched composition

recommended_settings.style_strength: high for historical accuracy and cinematic quality
recommended_settings.rendering_time: Allow extended rendering time for 8K quality and ultra detail

complete_prompt_string: Vintage French Belle Époque poster design, 1:1 square format for Instagram, 8K ultra-detailed quality, large prominent title 'HÉRO' in bold ornamental Art Nouveau decorative typography at top or center of square composition, main illustration featuring captivating night view of Paris 1889 during Exposition Universelle, newly inaugurated Eiffel Tower painted in Rouge Venise red-brown dramatically illuminated by powerful electric arc lights with cold blue-white glow, Haussmannian limestone buildings with zinc roofs flanking the composition, warm golden windows, bustling cobblestone streets with wet reflections like liquid gold, crowds in authentic 1889 Belle Époque evening attire, women in S-silhouette evening gowns with elaborate feathered hats, men in three-piece evening suits and frock coats wearing top hats with handlebar mustaches, dramatic contrast between warm golden gaslight and cold blue-white electric illumination, dense atmospheric fog with volumetric god rays, steam rising from chimneys, wet cobblestones reflecting lights creating mirror effects, green Morris columns, square poster composition in style of Jules Chéret or Toulouse-Lautrec theatrical posters, decorative borders or Art Nouveau flourishes, impressionist realism illustration style, autochrome aesthetic, rich vintage poster colors with deep blacks and brilliant highlights, industrial revolution atmosphere, historically accurate 1889 fashion and architecture, 8K razor-sharp ultra detail, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, professional vintage French poster design, bustling Belle Époque Paris night scene as poster artwork, Instagram-optimized square format

alternative_prompts.option_1_title_top_tower_centered: Vintage French poster, 1:1 square, large ornamental title 'HÉRO' in Art Nouveau typography at top, Eiffel Tower in Rouge Venise centered and illuminated by electric arc lights below, Belle Époque crowd in foreground on gaslit streets, wet cobblestone reflections, Haussmannian buildings flanking, atmospheric fog, decorative borders, Jules Chéret poster style, 8K ultra-detailed, historically accurate, Instagram format
alternative_prompts.option_2_title_center_overlaid: Belle Époque poster design, 1:1 square, 8K quality, giant decorative title 'HÉRO' in bold Art Nouveau lettering centered and overlaid, Paris 1889 night scene as background illustration, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower dramatically lit with electric lights, Belle Époque evening crowd in period attire, gaslight and electric illumination contrast, wet cobblestones, volumetric fog, Toulouse-Lautrec style poster, ornamental flourishes, Instagram optimized
alternative_prompts.option_3_intimate_street_scene: 1889 French poster, 1:1 square, 'HÉRO' as prominent title in elaborate decorative typography at top, intimate street-level night scene showing Belle Époque elegantly dressed crowd on gaslit cobblestones, Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower rising in background with electric arc lights, Haussmannian facades with warm windows, atmospheric night fog, decorative frame border, vintage poster colors, 8K ultra-detailed, Instagram format
alternative_prompts.option_4_symmetrical_composition: Elegant Belle Époque poster, 1:1 square, large refined title 'HÉRO' in sophisticated Art Nouveau typography at top, symmetrical composition with Rouge Venise Eiffel Tower centered and illuminated dramatically, Haussmannian buildings flanking on both sides, gaslit street in foreground with Belle Époque figures, balanced decorative elements, impressionist style illustration, vintage poster palette with gold accents, 8K detail, professional French poster design 1889, Instagram square format

usage_notes.for_midjourney: Use complete_prompt_string with --ar 1:1 --style raw --v 6 --quality 2 (for maximum detail)
usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use main_prompt + detailed_elements, add negative_prompt, use SDXL or SD3 for best quality, set dimensions to 2160x2160 or higher, enable high-res fix, use DPM++ sampler, high steps (50-80) for ultra detail
usage_notes.for_dalle: DALL-E 3 can handle the complete_prompt_string, request highest quality and specify 8K ultra-detailed requirement, 1024x1024 or higher
usage_notes.for_leonardo: Use main_prompt with style_keywords, set aspect ratio to 1:1, use Alchemy V2 or PhotoReal for best quality, resolution 2048x2048 or higher
instagram_tips: Export at minimum 1080x1080px for Instagram posts
Test different composition options (centered tower vs street scene)
Square format works perfectly for Instagram grid
Night vintage aesthetic creates strong visual impact in feeds
Title 'HÉRO' should be large enough to read on mobile screens
rendering_tips: 8K square rendering requires significant computing power
May need to render at 4K (2160x2160) and upscale to 8K
Test different title placement options for best balance
Night scenes require careful balance of light and shadow
Ensure Tower fits well in square composition without cropping top

text_design_guidance.typography_references: Art Nouveau period (emerging in 1889), Victorian decorative typography, French Belle Époque poster art (Toulouse-Lautrec style), Jules Chéret poster typography, ornamental letterforms
text_design_guidance.square_format_considerations: Title 'HÉRO' should be scaled appropriately for square format, not too large to overpower but prominent enough to be the focal point, balanced with vertical illustration below or behind
text_design_guidance.avoiding_modern_look: Ensure text appears as vintage poster title, not modern digital overlay, should have period-appropriate decorative style consistent with 1889 French poster art
text_design_guidance.color_contrast: Use strong color contrast for 'HÉRO' title to ensure visibility on Instagram mobile screens (gold, white, or warm tones against dark night background)

poster_design_direction.mood: Dramatic, awe-inspiring, romantic, showcasing the moment when Paris embraced electric light and modernity while retaining gaslit romance, sense of wonder and technological revolution, theatrical and elegant, Instagram-friendly visual impact
poster_design_direction.composition: Classic Belle Époque poster layout adapted to square format with large decorative title 'HÉRO' as focal point at top or center, night view of Paris 1889 as main illustration, balanced poster composition with optional decorative borders or Art Nouveau flourishes framing the square format
poster_design_direction.title_treatment: 'HÉRO' should be the dominant text element, large and bold in ornamental Art Nouveau typography, using color contrast (gold, white, or warm tones) to stand out against the darker night scene background, sized for mobile viewing
poster_design_direction.color_palette: Rich vintage poster colors: deep midnight blues, warm golden gaslights, cold electric blue-whites, Rouge Venise red-brown Tower, maintaining Belle Époque poster aesthetic with jewel tones and dramatic contrasts, Instagram-friendly saturation
poster_design_direction.poster_style: Authentic 1889 French poster art style following Jules Chéret's theatrical posters or early Toulouse-Lautrec work, with decorative typography, elegant composition adapted to square format, and impressionist illustration technique
poster_design_direction.atmosphere: Dense, atmospheric, mysterious yet inviting, the magic of Paris by night in the Belle Époque, steam and fog creating depth and mystery, overall feeling of a vintage theatrical or exhibition poster optimized for Instagram
poster_design_direction.instagram_optimization: Ensure composition works at small scale on mobile feeds, strong visual hierarchy with title and Tower as focal points, high contrast for thumb-stopping appeal
